capabilities.name: Session Start Hook
capabilities.description: Runs on Copilot SessionStart to initialise the session budget and context.

capabilities.name: Post Tool Use Hook
capabilities.description: Runs on Copilot PostToolUse to audit and record tool calls.

capabilities.name: Session Budget Hook
capabilities.description: Runs on Copilot PostToolUse to measure session context size and warn when the token budget is approached or exceeded.

capabilities.name: Compact Session Hook
capabilities.description: Runs on Copilot PreCompact to write a typed, high-recall compaction artifact a fresh session can resume from.

capabilities.name: Session Stop Hook
capabilities.description: Runs on Copilot Stop to persist session state and emit a digest.

capabilities.name: Validate Hooks
capabilities.description: Validates hooks/hooks.json against official VS Code event names; the live manifest contract is enforced in CI by the hooks-smoke test job.

capabilities.name: Check Artifact Allowlist
capabilities.description: CI script that verifies every repo file is listed in the artifact allowlist.

capabilities.name: Generate Docs
capabilities.description: Regenerates all sentinel-delimited capability sections in README and docs from the registry.

capabilities.name: Check Generated Docs
capabilities.description: CI lint step that exits 1 when any sentinel-delimited generated block is stale.

capabilities.name: Check File Budgets
capabilities.description: CI script that enforces per-file line and token budgets for agent and skill files.

capabilities.name: Generate Current Behavior
capabilities.description: CI script that generates docs/CURRENT_BEHAVIOR.md from the registry, hooks manifest, and test summary.

capabilities.name: Check Docs Drift
capabilities.description: CI lint step that exits 1 when docs assert hook events, config keys, or state names not in verified ground truth.

capabilities.name: Orchestrator
capabilities.description: Stage-gated workflow coordinator for feature, bug, and chore lanes.

capabilities.name: Full-stack
capabilities.description: Generic language/tool-agnostic implementation agent dispatched N times with a persona from devmate.config.json.

capabilities.name: Diagnose
capabilities.description: Bug-lane diagnosis agent that reproduces the bug and hands off to the full-stack fixer with the diagnosed persona.

capabilities.name: Rubber-Duck
capabilities.description: Adversarial reasoning agent dispatched in grill (pre-plan) and critique (post-plan) modes. Read-only.

capabilities.name: Spec-Writer
capabilities.description: Writes deterministic .devmate/session/spec.md output from planner artifacts and records task-state metadata.

capabilities.name: Backend
capabilities.description: Backend specialist persona wrapper. Dispatches fullstack with persona=backend. Scope: editableGlobs/offLimitsGlobs for backend persona in devmate.config.json.

capabilities.name: Frontend
capabilities.description: Frontend specialist persona wrapper. Dispatches fullstack with persona=frontend. Scope: editableGlobs/offLimitsGlobs for frontend persona in devmate.config.json.

capabilities.name: Editor
capabilities.description: Non-source editor persona wrapper. Dispatches fullstack with persona=editor. Scope: docs, configs, CI, migrations, chore files only.

capabilities.name: UI-UX
capabilities.description: Design-only feature-lane agent that produces a UI brief artifact with screens, interactions, error states, components, and unverified items.

capabilities.name: Security
capabilities.description: Pre-PR security review agent that reports typed findings with evidence pointers.

capabilities.name: TDD & Debug
capabilities.description: Activates the Red-Green-Refactor cycle and debug hypothesis loop for implementation agents.

capabilities.name: Devmate Init
capabilities.description: User-invocable skill exposed as the /devmate:devmate-init slash command. After running the command, reads .devmate/state/init-proposal.json for the proposed devmate.config.json.

capabilities.name: Devmate Map
capabilities.description: User-invocable skill exposed as the /devmate:devmate-map slash command. Generates a DRAFT business-domain map + context-file stubs under .devmate/session/ from repo structure, then applies to devmate.config.json only after explicit user confirmation (generate, review, apply).

capabilities.name: PR Review
capabilities.description: User-invocable skill exposed as the /devmate:devmate-pr-review slash command. Gathers a capped diff-vs-plan review context at .devmate/state/pr-review-context.json (branch diff, planning artifacts as pointers, precomputed alignment signals), then emits a typed PrReviewArtifact verdict to .devmate/state/pr-review-result.json. Defers authoritative security scanning to the security agent.
